speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: We continue to see strong demand across our network and our ULCC model remains the most compelling value proposition in the industry.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: Our balance sheet is in great shape and we have ample liquidity to continue executing on our fleet growth strategy.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: COVID-19 has created unprecedented challenges. We have taken immediate and decisive action to preserve cash and protect our business.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: While we saw bookings begin to recover in June, the recovery remains uncertain and we are operating in a very challenging environment.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: We ended the quarter with approximately $1.4 billion in liquidity, providing us a substantial runway as we navigate through this crisis.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: As we look ahead to 2021, we are optimistic about the recovery but remain cautious given the ongoing uncertainty from COVID-19.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: Demand trends are improving and we are seeing a strong leisure travel recovery. We expect to return to profitability in the second half.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: We are seeing very strong leisure demand and load factors are recovering quickly. Our ULCC model is well positioned for the recovery.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: Unit costs remain elevated due to higher fuel and labor costs, but we expect improvement as we scale capacity back up.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: We are pleased to announce that Frontier Airlines has proposed to merge with Spirit Airlines in an all-stock transaction.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: Despite the operational disruptions in the quarter, we remain focused on completing the Frontier merger and creating long-term value.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: JetBlue's offer presents compelling and certain value for our stockholders. We are recommending stockholders support the JetBlue transaction.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: Our operating costs per available seat mile continue to increase due to higher fuel prices and labor costs, creating headwinds to profitability.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: The JetBlue acquisition remains on track and we expect to close in the first half of 2023, pending DOJ review.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: Our CASM-ex fuel increased significantly in the quarter, reflecting higher labor and maintenance costs across the fleet.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: We are confident in the strategic and financial merits of the JetBlue transaction and look forward to its completion.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: Cash and cash equivalents at year end were approximately $1.3 billion. However we continue to monitor our liquidity position carefully.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: We are deeply disappointed by the DOJ's decision to seek to block our combination with JetBlue. We will vigorously defend this transaction.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: Our cash position declined in the quarter as we continue to invest in the business. We are evaluating all options to strengthen our balance sheet.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: We acknowledge that the operating environment remains challenging. We are taking aggressive cost actions to improve our financial performance.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: We ended the quarter with approximately $760 million in cash. We are focused on reducing our cash burn and improving liquidity.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: Following the court ruling blocking the JetBlue merger, we are evaluating all strategic alternatives to maximize stockholder value.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: Our cash balance continues to decline. We are in active discussions with our creditors and are exploring all available options.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: We have reached agreements with certain creditors on debt maturity extensions. We are working hard to stabilize our business.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: Our cash position at year end was approximately $865 million. We have significant debt maturities in 2025 that we need to address urgently.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: We are implementing a comprehensive restructuring plan to right-size our fleet and cost structure for the current environment.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: We are in advanced discussions with our bondholders regarding a potential out-of-court debt restructuring. We cannot provide assurance of success.

speaker: CEO Ted Christie
quote: The challenges we face are significant. We are exploring all strategic alternatives including potential sale, merger, or other transactions.

speaker: CFO Scott Haralson
quote: Our liquidity position is very tight. We have approximately $234 million in cash and are burning cash each month.
